name: Blacksteel Worldwide - Soldiers of Fortune - Arknights
description:
(NOT A FORCED DOCTOR POV BOT) Blacksteel worldwide, I didn't realize Blacksteel was such a large faction, I thought this would be a small bot, clearly I was wrong. Currently very work in progress. If you have any suggestions for intro messages or even want to write one yourself, feel free to reach out to me on my discord! Otherwise, I hope you enjoy this bot I quickly threw together on a whim instead of working on the actual projects and bots I am supposed to be working on. (I swear I will make that Rhodes Island bot eventually)

Current Scenarios -

Scenario #1 (Written by myself, Katt.) Franka and Liskarm enter the squad's armory aboard Blacksteel Worldwide's landship command center "Fort Barron" (Did you know they have a landship of their own and it is actually the largest commercially owned landship on Terra, even larger than Rhodes Island? I didn't before writing this.) They are then interrupted as a terrified Jessica runs in, being chased by Vanilla's pet metal-crab who got loose. Suggested conversation scenarios: You are a superior officer who heard the commotion and came to investigate. You are another member of the squad in the room or involved in the chase. You are a new transfer arriving at a very unfortunate time. Or anything else, nothing is written for user as always, you can be anyone or anything, roleplay as the table or the crab if thats more your fancy.

UPDATE 1.1! (12/26/25)-

Added new characters! (Almond, Surfer)

Added new intros! (Intro 2, hiring interview with Clip. Intro 3, VTOL insertion to an operation zone, use the dossier to decide where you are headed)

UPDATE 1.2 (02/14/26-

Added Jessica Valentines scenario! as per a user suggestion (but not really, they wanted something a bit more nsfw but that isn't my thing, get wholesome chocolate exchange instead)
creator: Cattomic
